headline: BMO Capital Maintains a Hold Rating on The Progressive Corporation (PGR)
summary: ​The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) is one of the Most Undervalued High Quality Stocks to Buy Now. On May 5, Michael Zaremski from BMO Capital reiterated a Hold rating on the shares and raised the price target from $199.31 to $221. On the same day, Evercore ISI reiterated a Hold rating on shares with a price […]
